Pathway Categories

Opportunities suited for young leaders

Earn competitive wages, acquire professional global references, and support yourself while exploring the world's most beautiful destinations.

Signature Program

USA Summer Camp Counselor

We recruit and train passionate young people through intensive, practical camp courses in Kenya and across Africa to work in leading American summer camps as camp counselors.

View Details & Requirements
Location
United States (Nationwide)
Duration
9–12 Weeks (May–Aug)
Compensation
$1,800–$2,500 pocket money + fully covered food, lodging & medical insurance

Independent Route

6 Months – 2 Years

Corporate Profile

Making the world a global village

Camp Counselors Africa is dedicated to creating and facilitating travel experiences that expand awareness and give each person a true sense of the country and culture they are visiting. We specialize in East Africa because of our roots — giving every client the most complete travel experience at the best price.

Our corporate headquarters are proudly situated in Rongai, Kenya. As our platform grows, we're building new institutional partnerships to expand what we can offer — details to follow as each one is confirmed.

Our Purpose
Mission

To provide great business values and optimized solutions needed by our clients to finally improve our stakeholders' quality of life.

Vision

To be the number one player in global secure solutions.

01

Integrity

Honesty and absolute ethical standards in all we do.

02

Competence

Qualified staff delivering secure and optimized results.

03

Client Forever

Lifelong commitment to client success and satisfaction.

04

Committed

Dedicated to solving real problems and guiding travel dreams.

05

Added Value

Delivering cost-effective, high-quality global placements.

Summer Camps

Training & Bonding

Running signature pioneer camps focusing on team bonding, leadership, and survival skillsets.

Tours & Travel

Custom Dream Tours

Full vacation-shopping — finding the highest-quality itineraries in Kenya and Africa at the best market prices.

High-Security Specialty

Security Vetting & Intelligence Screening

A thorough background-checking process carried out on potential candidates for sensitive dockets. We enlist specialized intelligence-gathering methods to verify whether candidates hold any incriminating pasts that would render them unsuitable — giving recruiters maximum peace of mind.

Historical Milestone Archive

20+ years of camp training legacy

CCA isn't just an agency; it's a family forged over two decades under the acacia canopy. Hundreds of young Kenyans have lived in campsites, pitched wilderness camps, and mastered child psychology before boarding their international flights.

2002

The Pioneer Naivasha Training Camps

Fisherman's Camp, Lake Naivasha, Kenya

Our first pioneer cohort of young counselors gathered on the banks of Lake Naivasha. Camping under massive yellow-barked acacia trees, they completed rigorous training in leadership, first aid, and teamwork — laying the groundwork for Camp Counselors Africa.

2012

UK Working Holiday Pathway Opens

Nairobi Admissions Office

CCA began guiding independent explorers through UK Youth Mobility visa pathways, beyond the camp-counselor track.

2023

Professional Placement Corridor Opens

Canada, Australia & EU Corridors

A new official placement partnership opened structured, paid professional roles across Canada, Australia, and the EU for CCA alumni.

2026

Canada Summer Camps & Continent-Wide Recruitment

Rongai, Kenya — and Beyond

With this new platform, we're expanding our signature summer camp program to Canada and opening recruitment beyond Kenya to candidates across Africa.

Common Questions

FAQs

Who can apply to Camp Counselors Africa programs?

We recruit young leaders aged 18–35 from Kenya and across Africa. Requirements vary slightly by program — the USA summer camp route looks for people comfortable working with children, while professional placements look for relevant work experience.

How much does it cost to apply?

Speak with an admissions counselor directly for current program fees — costs vary by destination and route, and we'll walk you through exactly what's covered (like housing and meals on the USA camp route) versus what you'd need to budget yourself.

How long does the process take?

From application to departure typically takes a few months, depending on visa processing times for your destination country and program intake dates. Applying early gives you the best shot at your preferred placement.

Do I need to already know how to swim or have childcare experience?

For camp counselor roles, swimming ability and comfort working with children help — but we provide training at our Naivasha grounds before departure. Tell us your current experience level honestly in your application so we can match you to the right role.

What's the difference between the summer camp and professional placement routes?

Summer camp programs (USA, and soon Canada) are seasonal, youth-focused roles with housing and meals covered. Professional placements — through our partnership for Canada, Australia, and the EU — are structured, paid roles in fields like hospitality, arranged over a longer term.

How do I get in touch?

Call or WhatsApp us directly, or fill out the application form above and an admissions counselor will call you back within 48 hours.

Camp Counselors Africa

Grooming leaders, connecting hearts. We train youth leaders through campsite outdoor survival, child-care counseling, and teamwork training across Kenya and across Africa, deploying them to camps and careers in the USA, UK, Canada, Australia, and the EU.

Kenya Office

P.O. Box 60177-00200, Nairobi, Kenya

Call +254 736 68 79 79 Call +254 790 668 073 Email info@cca.co.ke

Regulatory Declarations

Operates in adherence with US Dept. of State J-1 Exchange Visitor Sponsor specifications, UK Youth Mobility (T5) provisions, and our official placement partnership licensing for Canada, Australia, and the EU.
